titleStmt.title: SII 41.211: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 211. (A.R. No. 429 of 1905.) Tiruttaṇi, Tiruttani Taluk, Chittoor District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Viraṭṭānēśvara temple at Tiruttaṇi.

summary.p: Mutilated. Registers purchase of land from a Brahmin lady by one Pārthasāradhi a temple official of Śrīkrishṉapurattu Emperumān for feeding pilgrims going to and returning from Śrivēṅgaḍam (i.e. Upper Tirupati). The land was made tax-free by the sabhā of the village on receipt of the tax-money from Pārthasārathi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīkraṣṇapurattu Eḻunn=taruḷi niṉṟa Emperumāṉ kaṉmi pārtthasāradhi meṟpaṭi śrīveṅkaṭayātrai povāṟkum varuvāṟkum Āhāram Iṭuvataṟku vilai koṇṭuṭaiya pūmi śrījaṉanātavatikkuk kiḻakku śrīrā
jarāja vāykālukku teṟkut mutaṟkaṇṇāṟṟu mūṉṟāñcaturattukkuḻi Irunūṟṟu nālum pālāciriyaṉ lakṣmaṇa kramavittaṉ brāhmaṇi comaiccāṉi pakkal Iccaturatte vi
lai koṇṭuṭaiya kuḻi muṉṉūṟṟaṟupattu nālum Iṅke Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu mūṉṟāñ caturattu meṟpaṭiyāḷ pakkal vilai koṇṭuṭaiya kuḻi nāṟpattu nālumākak kuḻi Aṟunūṟṟo
rupattiraṇṭukkum Emmilicain=ta Iṟaidravyam Iśrīkraṣṇapurattu Eḻun=taruḷi niṉṟa Emperumāṉ kaṉmi pārtthasāradhi pakkaleyaṟakkoṇṭu Idharmma ntundrātittavaṟ niṟpatāka Iṟai Iḻicci
śilālekai ceytu kuṭuttom sabhaiyom Itu Eṅkaḷ rakṣaiyum Aṭiyār śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣaiyum Itu rakṣittāṉ śrīpātam Ittaṉmañ ceytāṉ talai melaṉa Ivai Ivvūr madhya
staṉ tammaṉan=tieḻuvan ceṉamuttaṉāṉa Āyirattirunūṟṟuvaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 41.211 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
